query: SELECT equip_id, name, slot, hp_bonus, attack_bonus, defense_bonus, speed_bonus, wood_res, fire_res, earth_res, metal_res, water_res FROM game_equipment_catalog WHERE (wood_res > 0 OR fire_res > 0 OR earth_res > 0 OR metal_res > 0 OR water_res > 0) LIMIT 15;
